title: More Bows and Arrows
description: The objective of More Bows and Arrows is to improve the ranged combat of the games, adding around fifty bows and arrows with different abilities and characteristics.
body:
![MORE BOWS AND ARROWS BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxlh6j/images/94e23ff2a57835e9e00542d2dbe1b440cfe8e491.webp) The goal of More Bows and Arrows is to add a wide variety of bows and arrows with new abilities, more damage, and most importantly, more fun to use. Also, always trying to make the game experience as “vanilla” as possible, but with great improvements for the bows and arrows. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![MORE BOWS AND ARROWS SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxlh6j/images/0c38fe498fd655a09bfe4403ef3a9df4a960c10d.webp) Apart from adding a great variety of bows and arrows, which, for example, will be able to shoot TNT or simply do much more damage. Six new enchantments have been added, with very fun mechanics, such as the ability to load the bow faster, or shoot multiple arrows. ![MORE BOWS AND ARROWS F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxlh6j/images/c09d199eefdbb9d205b09dc56a8a646f302036a6.webp) ### Is it compatible with other mods that add bows or arrows? In principle there would be no problem in making use of these bows with other arrows added by other mods of the style. In any case, if you find any compatibility problem you can contact us and we will get to work. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![MORE BOWS AND ARROWS SCREENSHOTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxlh6j/images/cab904dd6ffb2675c7d03f7f355859d9ed37903e.webp) ![MORE BOWS AND ARROWS IMAGE 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxlh6j/images/0e6402729e1012843eb685081df83954c1b043b5.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
